tasks.subject: Task 0: Add `mobile` variant to AuthButton
tasks.description:
**Goal:** AuthButton supports a `variant="mobile"` prop that renders a full-width prominent button suitable for the mobile overlay, in three states (loading / not-authenticated / authenticated).

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/components/AuthButton.tsx` — add a new `variant === 'mobile'` branch
- Modify: `src/app/komplexaci.css` — append CSS for `.mobile-nav-auth*`, `.mobile-nav-login`, `.mobile-nav-user`, `.mobile-nav-avatar`, `.mobile-nav-username`, `.mobile-nav-logout`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- `<AuthButton variant="mobile" />` renders without crashing
- Not-authenticated: full-width Discord-purple button with icon, ≥48px tall
- Authenticated: avatar + username + Logout, full-width
- Loading: pulsing dot reusing pill-nav-pulse keyframe
- No regressions to pill or default variants

**Verify:** preview_console_logs level: error → no new errors. Visual verification deferred to Task 2 when overlay mounts the component.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/components/AuthButton.tsx", "src/app/komplexaci.css"], "verifyCommand": "preview_console_logs serverId:<id> level:error lines:10", "acceptanceCriteria": ["variant=mobile renders", "not-auth: full-width Discord button >=48px tall", "auth: avatar+username+Logout", "loading: pulsing dot", "no regressions to pill/default"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: Add hamburger button + responsive pill rearrangement
tasks.description:
**Goal:** At ≤768px the floating pill shows only KOMPLEXÁCI brand + hamburger button. Desktop nav items + AuthButton hidden via CSS. Hamburger always in DOM. Tapping hamburger toggles `isMenuOpen` state and morphs lines to ×; no overlay yet.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/app/components/Header.tsx` — add `isMenuOpen` state, hamburger `<button>` JSX with toggle handler
- Modify: `src/app/komplexaci.css` — add `.pill-nav-hamburger` styles + `.is-open` morph; overhaul `@media (max-width: 768px)` and remove the `@media (max-width: 520px)` block

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Desktop >768px: zero visual change
- ≤768px: pill shows brand + hamburger only; no overflow at 375 or 320
- Hamburger ≥44×44 tap area
- Tap toggles `is-open` class (× morph), no overlay yet
- Dock-on-scroll still works at mobile width

**Verify:** preview_resize desktop+screenshot for regression; preview_resize mobile+screenshot for layout; preview_inspect for tap area; preview_click for toggle; scroll test for dock.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/app/components/Header.tsx", "src/app/komplexaci.css"], "verifyCommand": "preview_screenshot at desktop and mobile widths; preview_inspect .pill-nav-hamburger", "acceptanceCriteria": ["desktop unchanged", "mobile: brand+hamburger no overflow", "hamburger >=44x44", "tap toggles is-open class", "dock-on-scroll works"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Add mobile overlay (state, JSX, effects, styles, animations)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Tapping hamburger opens full-screen overlay with Login + Domů + O nás + Členové + Hry (inline expandable submenu) + Discord + Kontakt. Body scroll locked, ESC closes, focus trap inside, focus returns to hamburger on close. Open: 0.32s slide + stagger-fade items.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/app/components/Header.tsx` — add `hrySubmenuOpenMobile` state, `hamburgerRef` + `overlayRef`, body-scroll-lock + ESC effect, focus-restore effect, focus-trap effect, modify `navigateToSection` to close overlay, render overlay JSX with `<AuthButton variant="mobile" />` and items with active-section indicator
- Modify: `src/app/komplexaci.css` — `.mobile-nav-overlay*`, `.mobile-nav-list*`, `.mobile-nav-item`, `.mobile-nav-submenu*`, `.mobile-nav-caret`, stagger keyframes, `@media (max-width: 768px)` to show overlay container, `@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce)` overrides

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Tap hamburger opens overlay with all items
- Login button visible at top
- Hry expands inline showing 3 sub-items
- Tap section item closes overlay AND scrolls/navigates
- ESC closes overlay
- Body scroll locked while open
- Focus returns to hamburger on close
- Focus trap cycles Tab among focusable elements
- Active section: 4px left-edge accent bar in section color
- Reduced motion: opacity-only, no slide, no stagger
- Desktop unaffected (no overlay visible)

**Verify:** preview_click hamburger + screenshot; preview_eval for body.style.overflow, ESC dispatch, focus checks; preview_inspect for accent bar; desktop regression screenshot.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/app/components/Header.tsx", "src/app/komplexaci.css"], "verifyCommand": "preview_click .pill-nav-hamburger; preview_screenshot; preview_eval document.body.style.overflow", "acceptanceCriteria": ["overlay opens with all items+login", "Hry inline submenu 3 items", "section tap closes+scrolls", "ESC closes", "body scroll locked", "focus returns to hamburger", "focus trap cycles", "active section 4px accent bar", "reduced motion opacity-only", "desktop unaffected"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: End-to-end acceptance verification
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Run through every acceptance criterion from the spec via preview tools and confirm. Fix any issues inline.

**Files:** None modified unless an issue is found.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- All spec acceptance criteria pass

**Verify:** Run all 11 verification steps from Task 3 of plan. preview_resize across 320/375/768/769/1024/1920; tap+nav+ESC+dock+undock+overlay-from-docked; final console check.
